---
title: "bayesian_project"
output: html_document
author: Phoebe Teskey
email: phoebeteskey@arizona.edu
date: 15/04/2026
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(brms)
```


```{r}
veg <- read.csv("../data/soil_transects.csv")

# convert to factors
veg$SpeciesName <- as.factor(veg$SpeciesName)
veg$SiteID <- as.factor(veg$SiteID)
veg$Transect <- as.factor(veg$Transect)
veg$SoilType <- as.factor(veg$SoilType)

str(veg$nValue)
veg$nValue <- as.integer(as.numeric(veg$nValue))
veg <- veg %>%
  drop_na(nValue, SoilType, ESD_Designation, SiteID, Transect, SpeciesName)

```

```{r}
model <- brm(
  nValue ~ SoilType + ESD_Designation + (1|SiteID) + (1|Transect) + (1|SpeciesName),
  data = veg,
  family = negbinomial(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 2000
)
```
